'''Grumphs''' were large [[Lizard/Legends|lizards]] that were native [[Nimba Five]]. Their bodies covered with spines, and each hand was capped with sharp claws. No [[Human/Legends|Human]] before the lucky [[Sam Heggs]] had ever survived to see one. Their eggs were purple and were found in shallow pits of snow.

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxyCite|2|Tales from Mos Eisley: Heggs' Tale}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
